## Config.deleteLivemodeValue() method

deleteLivemodeValue deletes livemode value of given key in keyring and removes the redacted version from the config file Ported from: profile.go deleteLivemodeValue function

**Signature:**

```typescript
deleteLivemodeValue(fieldID: string): Promise<void>;
```
